caption: The video displays a screen recording of a web browser navigating the website random.org. The interface features a top navigation bar with links such as "Games," "Numbers," and "Lists & More." The "RANDOM.ORG" logo is prominent at the top left of the main content area. Initially, a "Dice Roller" tool is shown, stating "You rolled 2 dice:" above two dice icons showing 4 and 3. The scene then transitions to a "List Randomizer" result page. This page lists six items in random order: "1. NORTHWEST," "2. SEAN FRANK," "3. ATLANTIC," "4. SEAN FRANK 1," "5. SOUTHWEST," and "6. Sile Berter." The page includes a timestamp of "2022-07-05 22:12:15 UTC" and a warning: "Don't use this service for giveaways!" Banners for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" and a "Subscribe" button appear along the edges of the screen throughout the clip.
